SEARCH
モジュール org.commonutils
パッケージ org.commonutils.id

クラス Ulid

java.lang.Object
org.commonutils.id.Ulid
public final class Ulid extends Object
Static factory for ULIDs: 48-bit Unix millisecond timestamp (Instant.toEpochMilli() semantics) in the most significant bits, 80 bits of randomness, encoded as 26 uppercase Crockford Base32 characters.

Timestamps follow the same rules as UuidV7: Instants whose millisecond value is negative or greater than 281474976710655L are rejected with IllegalArgumentException.

The no-argument overloads of fromInstant(Instant) and fromClock(Clock) use the same cryptographically strong RandomGenerator as UuidV7. When a generator is supplied, thread safety matches that of the given generator.

Public methods validate non-null references with NullPointerException where null is not permitted.

導入されたバージョン:
0.2.0

  • フィールドの概要

    フィールド
    修飾子とタイプ
    フィールド
    説明
    static final @NonNull String
    CROCKFORD_BASE32
    Canonical Crockford Base32 alphabet for ULID (uppercase only in generated strings); ULIDs are case-insensitive when parsing elsewhere, but this library emits uppercase only.
    static final int
    ENCODED_LENGTH
    Number of characters in a canonical ULID string (10 time + 16 random).
    static final int
    RANDOM_BYTES
    Length of the random component in bytes (80 bits).
    static final int
    RANDOM_CHARS
    Crockford Base32 characters encoding the 80-bit random component.
    static final int
    TIME_CHARS
    Crockford Base32 characters encoding the 48-bit timestamp (10×5 bits, last group zero-pads by two bits).

  • メソッドの概要

    修飾子とタイプ
    メソッド
    説明
    static @NonNull String
    encode(long unixTsMs, byte @NonNull [] randomness)
    Encodes a validated Unix millisecond timestamp and exactly 10 random bytes into a canonical ULID string.
    static @NonNull String
    fromClock(@NonNull Clock clock)
    Creates a ULID from Clock.instant() using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    static @NonNull String
    fromClock(@NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
    Creates a ULID from Clock.instant() and the given random source.
    static @NonNull String
    fromInstant(@NonNull Instant instant)
    Creates a ULID from an instant using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
    static @NonNull String
    fromInstant(@NonNull Instant instant, @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
    Creates a ULID from instant and the given random source.

  • フィールド詳細

    • CROCKFORD_BASE32

      @NonNull public static final @NonNull String CROCKFORD_BASE32
      Canonical Crockford Base32 alphabet for ULID (uppercase only in generated strings); ULIDs are case-insensitive when parsing elsewhere, but this library emits uppercase only.

      Number of characters in a canonical ULID string (10 time + 16 random).

  • メソッドの詳細

    • fromInstant

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String fromInstant(@NonNull @NonNull Instant instant)
      Creates a ULID from an instant using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      instant - source instant (truncated to milliseconds), must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null canonical ULID string of length ENCODED_LENGTH
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if instant is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the instant's millisecond value is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • fromInstant

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String fromInstant(@NonNull @NonNull Instant instant, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
      Creates a ULID from instant and the given random source.
      パラメータ:
      instant - source instant (truncated to milliseconds), must not be null
      random - source for 10 entropy bytes (big-endian in the encoded output), must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null canonical ULID string
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the instant's millisecond value is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • fromClock

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String fromClock(@NonNull @NonNull Clock clock)
      Creates a ULID from Clock.instant() using a cryptographically strong RandomGenerator.
      パラメータ:
      clock - clock to read, must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null canonical ULID string
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if clock is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the clock instant's millisecond value is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • fromClock

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String fromClock(@NonNull @NonNull Clock clock, @NonNull @NonNull RandomGenerator random)
      Creates a ULID from Clock.instant() and the given random source.
      パラメータ:
      clock - clock to read, must not be null
      random - source for 10 entropy bytes, must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null canonical ULID string
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if any argument is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if the clock instant's millisecond value is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0

    • encode

      @NonNull public static @NonNull String encode(long unixTsMs, byte @NonNull [] randomness)
      Encodes a validated Unix millisecond timestamp and exactly 10 random bytes into a canonical ULID string. Useful for deterministic tests; production code often prefers fromInstant(Instant, RandomGenerator).
      パラメータ:
      unixTsMs - Unix epoch milliseconds (same representability rules as UuidV7)
      randomness - exactly 10 bytes interpreted as big-endian for Base32 encoding of the random section, must not be null
      戻り値:
      a non-null ULID string of length ENCODED_LENGTH
      例外:
      NullPointerException - if randomness is null
      IllegalArgumentException - if randomness.length != RANDOM_BYTES or unixTsMs is not representable as a 48-bit unsigned Unix timestamp
      導入されたバージョン:
      0.2.0
